mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT contest_number, title, detail, start_date, end_date, host_company, tech_stack, status FROM UB_CONTEST WHERE status = 'м§„н–үмӨ‘' ORDER BY end_date ASC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT /* лі„м№ӯмқ„ DTOмқҳ н•„л“ңлӘ…мқё mentoringNumberмҷҖ м •нҷ•нһҲ мқјм№ҳмӢңнӮөлӢҲлӢӨ */ m.MENTORING_NUMBER AS mentoringNumber, m.MENTOR_NUMBER AS mentorNumber, m.MENTORING_TITLE AS mentoringTitle, m.MENTORING_GOAL AS mentoringGoal, s.subject_name AS subjectName, mb.member_nickname AS memberNickname, f.file_name AS fileName, sm.grad_school AS gradSchool, sm.grad_depart AS gradDepart FROM UB_MENTORING m JOIN UB_MEMBER mb ON m.MENTOR_NUMBER = mb.member_number LEFT JOIN UB_SUBJECT s ON m.SUBJECT_NUMBER = s.subject_number LEFT JOIN UB_FILE f ON mb.file_number = f.file_number LEFT JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR sm ON mb.survey_number = sm.survey_number WHERE mb.member_state = 'кі„м • нҷңм„ұнҷ”' ORDER BY m.CREATED_AT DESC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= 7

SELECT employment_id AS employmentId, company_name AS companyName, employment_title AS employmentTitle, employment_location AS employmentLocation, employment_career AS employmentCareer, employment_education AS employmentEducation, employment_log AS employmentLog, employment_url AS employmentUrl FROM UB_COMPANY ORDER BY employment_id DESC
